description: Maranode audit JSONL → Elastic Common Schema

script.description: Map maranode event type → ECS event fields
script.source:
String evType = ctx.event;
          if (evType == null) evType = 'unknown';
          ctx['event.action'] = evType;

          Map kindMap = [
            'inference_start':       'start',
            'inference_complete':    'end',
            'inference_failed':      'end',
            'daemon_start':          'start',
            'daemon_stop':           'end',
            'model_imported':        'creation',
            'model_removed':         'deletion',
            'workspace_shredded':    'deletion',
            'isolation_probe':       'info',
            'isolation_applied':     'change',
            'rag_document_ingested': 'creation',
            'rag_retrieval':         'access',
            'audit_verified':        'info',
            'binary_attested':       'info',
            'config_reloaded':       'change'
          ];
          ctx['event.type'] = kindMap.getOrDefault(evType, 'info');

          Map catMap = [
            'inference_start':       'process',
            'inference_complete':    'process',
            'inference_failed':      'process',
            'rag_document_ingested': 'file',
            'rag_retrieval':         'database',
            'model_imported':        'file',
            'model_removed':         'file',
            'workspace_shredded':    'file',
            'isolation_probe':       'network',
            'isolation_applied':     'configuration',
            'audit_verified':        'iam',
            'binary_attested':       'host',
            'daemon_start':          'host',
            'daemon_stop':           'host',
            'config_reloaded':       'configuration'
          ];
          ctx['event.category'] = catMap.getOrDefault(evType, 'configuration');
          ctx['event.kind'] = 'event';
